creator: darksoul@darkbsd.org
text:
Thank you, but I just checked the commit ( https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/dns/unbound/Makefile?view=markup&pathrev=381404
 ) , and found these two things :
- Line 32 : "FILTER_AAA" should be "FILTER_AAAA"
- Line 103 : "at ${WRKSRC}/contrib/aaaa-filter-iterator.patch" should be "cat ${WRKSRC}/contrib/aaaa-filter-iterator.patch"

Also, is it normal to not define a description for FILTER_AAAA ?
